# johnnybuildstech

> Bespoke, hand-coded websites for UK small businesses, consultants, clinicians,
> coaches, and indie founders. Built on Vercel with £0/month hosting. Run by
> Jonathan, an independent designer-developer working from the studio as
> johnnybuildstech.

## What I do

- **Landing pages** — one-page hand-built sites for a single offer or campaign.
- **Service sites** — multi-page marketing sites for service businesses.
- **Full builds** — service site + blog + bespoke interactions.
- All sites are coded by hand (Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, Motion, GSAP) and
  hosted on Vercel. No templates, no page builders.
- **Ongoing cost**: around £10–£80 per year (domain + optional business email).
  Vercel Hobby tier is free for small-business traffic.

## Who it's for

- UK service businesses, consultants, clinicians, therapists, coaches.
- Solo founders and indie app makers who want a bespoke product site.
- People who dislike templated, generic-looking websites.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://johnnybuildstech.com/
- Services & pricing: https://johnnybuildstech.com/services
- Contact: https://johnnybuildstech.com/contact
- About: https://johnnybuildstech.com/about
- Notes (essays): https://johnnybuildstech.com/notes

## Notes (essays on website craft, published irregularly)

- https://johnnybuildstech.com/notes/why-your-template-website-feels-dead
  — Why templated websites (Squarespace/Wix) feel generic, and what bespoke
  fixes.
- https://johnnybuildstech.com/notes/real-cost-vercel-website-small-business
  — Transparent £0-£80/year breakdown of running a small-business website on
  Vercel, plus where the build cost actually sits.
- https://johnnybuildstech.com/notes/eleven-parts-of-a-landing-page
  — Eleven anatomical parts of a high-converting landing page, with
  anti-template tips for each section.
- https://johnnybuildstech.com/notes/handmade-web-manifesto
  — A short manifesto for building websites the slow way.
- https://johnnybuildstech.com/notes/custom-website-vs-squarespace-cost
  — Five-year cost comparison: custom site on Vercel vs Squarespace vs Wix,
  with guidance on which wins when.
